info.name: Calendax API
info.description: Complete API collection for Calendax multi-tenant server

variable.description: Tenant slug — sent as x-tenant-id header

request.description: Returns pages accessible in the sidebar for the logged-in admin.
Reorders a page by moving it from currentIndex to newIndex.
Public route. Used to verify a tenant exists by its slug before login.
Creates tenant + provisions its database. The tenant slug is used as x-tenant-id.

item.name: Tenant - Auth
item.description: All tenant routes require the x-tenant-id header.

request.description: Returns sites assigned to the currently logged-in user.

body.raw:
{
  "protocolId": "{{protocolId}}",
  "documentId": "{{documentId}}",
  "question": "What is the primary endpoint of this study?",
  "summary": "Primary endpoint question",
  "indication": "Diabetes"
}

request.description: tone: AgentTone enum, gender: AgentGender enum

query.description: LeadStatus enum: new | contacted | qualified | disqualified | converted

body.raw:
{
  "leads": [

      "firstName": "Jane",
      "lastName": "Smith",
      "phone": "+1987654321",

request.description: LeadStatus enum values vary by implementation.
Returns PrefilledPatientDto populated from lead data.

item.name: Tenant - Facebook Webhook
item.description: These are called by Facebook, not your frontend.

request.description: Used by Facebook to verify the webhook endpoint. Not called by your app.
Called by Facebook when a new lead is submitted via a connected form.
